## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you would like to see.

## Why It Matters

Explain the delivery, workflow, or operational value.

## Scope Notes

- MCP tools
- policy modules
- Codex skills
- documentation
- packaging or installation
